rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation annexes in valid implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component names, ports, directions, data types, subcomponents, and connections as the input AADL model
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Omit clauses involving event ports in numeric or Boolean comparisons unless the model provides an explicit data value
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use guarantee for output dependency contracts
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
